title: LAir's Structures
description: This mod adds new structures to Minecraft's biomes: a Mesa Ranch, a Mountain Tent, and a Desert Tomb.
body:
# Minecraft Mod: New Structures for Exploration  

This mod introduces new structures to Minecraft, offering more opportunities for exploration.  

## Mountain Tents  
To enhance exploration in the mountain biomes, this mod adds tents where you can discover various useful items.  
![A tent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c38772d3681c6315d3b155fc6f1602efc5ae26.jpeg)

## Desert Tomb  
The **Desert Tomb** makes desert wells finally useful by hiding treasures beneath them.  
![A Desert Tomb hidden under a well.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a80cdaaf86160bc84408cb37908ee601029603d.jpeg)  

## Mesa Ranch  
Another addition is the **Mesa Ranch**, populated by sheriff villagers. These Far West-style ranches are home to cowboy villagers offering unique trades.  
![Cowboy villager trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53455c544b122b840443b997f1208bca7f64997b.jpeg)  

In this ranch, you can find a saloon in which there is often a lot of villagers. 
![A saloon in a Mesa biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0b1178f008884c01f25595a9e72478dc1a56b4a.jpeg)  

This mod also introduces exciting features like **bank heists**, the **Wanted effect**, and **revolvers**.  
![A revolver in hand in front of a bank.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1a10bd264809c029e7ecf8e1893622827726f96.jpeg)  

After completing a heist, you’ll need to escape quickly before the sheriffs catch up to you!  
![The Wanted effect and the vault of the bank.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64cadc22fc5237c2a2a03558e2bec7c6445f33d1.jpeg)  

## Learn More  
To discover more about this mod, check out the creation video:
